mandatory_clauses.description: Full names and addresses of both employer and employee
Start date of the seasonal period
End date or duration of the seasonal period
Type of seasonal work (e.g., harvest, packaging, tourism)
Work location including any accommodation address if provided
Gross hourly or daily rate meeting minimum wage for the worker's age
Expected daily or weekly working hours
Vakantiegeld of at least 8% of gross salary or daily accrual statement
